mca_reunion.title: Visit every MCA Reborn villager you have befriended — check in with your community

village_food.title: Cook a feast and share it — deliver 4 high-quality meals to your settlement's residents

camera_portrait.title: Take a portrait photograph of your base (Exposure mod camera) — document the homecoming

subtitle.text: The community you left behind is the community you return to. They need to know you came back.

description: The people you left in the kingdom you built in Ch12 are still there.
They have been there the whole time.
The bounty board has been running without you.
The Villager Recruits have been holding the line.
Frieren's companions grew old while she was on her next adventure.
The lesson is not to slow down. The lesson is to come back.
Returning is intentional. Returning means the community was worth returning to.
That is what civilizations do that survive.
